narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 6-A (precinct in Ross County) has 640 registered voters, with 70.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
